title: dierbachia breviflora
intro: Dierbachia breviflora, also known as Short-flowered Dierbachia, is a plant species belonging to the genus Dierbachia and family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dierbachia breviflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Dierbachia breviflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues.
